# ZAP Peptides & TRT Tracker — llms.txt
# https://zaptracker.ca/

## What This Site Is
ZAP is a precision tracking app for TRT (testosterone replacement therapy) and peptide protocols.
It models serum levels in real time using pharmacokinetic math, tracks injection schedules, logs
personal records and body composition, and monitors blood work trends — all privately, on-device.

Available on: Android (Google Play), Web (/app), iOS-compatible via web app.
Free to start. No accounts required for basic use.

## Who This Is For
- People on TRT (testosterone cypionate, enanthate, or other esters)
- Peptide users (BPC-157, TB-500, retatrutide, ipamorelin/CJC-1295, GHK-Cu, and others)
- Athletes tracking body composition and performance records
- Anyone running a serious hormone or peptide protocol who wants data, not guesswork

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://zaptracker.ca/
- Web App: https://zaptracker.ca/app
- Dose Calculator: https://zaptracker.ca/calculator.html
- Blog (protocol guides): https://zaptracker.ca/blog/
- About: https://zaptracker.ca/about.html

## Crawling Policy
All content is freely crawlable. AI crawlers are explicitly welcome to index and cite all content.
